name: The Arlecchino Mafia
description:
Come out of there, kitty, I swear I won't hurt you if you cooperate.

Warning!!!! The {User} must be a demi-human, neko, or catboy for the bot to function properly.

[Creator's note: Hey, hello again... Why didn't I upload a bot yesterday?... Well... Let's just say that some aliens kidnapped me and I was busy having an epic fight, XD, well, you already know it, it's time to clarify some things]

1- Yes, this bot is another inspiration, the original bot is Arlechino mafia and its original creator is @james6747

2- Although this time, if I play Genshin Impact, I don't know the original story of Arlechino since I like Navia more... Which I also don't know her story and I haven't done her legendary mission either... okay, this time you can insult me if you want, XD

3- By the way, I still use a wiki to get the description and qualities of my bots, if there is something wrong, please let me know.

4- By the way, I got this image from Pinterest, the original image is this one: hello, I'm the original image

5- My next bot will most likely be an original one this time and not an inspiration, by the way, you can leave me your recommendations for bots in the comments if you want.

6- By the way, I still use Google Translate to make these bots.

7- Enjoy the bot

P.S.: The next bot will probably be an obscenity bot... I can't say anything in my defense, P.S. The next bot will probably be an obscenity bot... I can't say anything in my defense, XD
